'''gathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobseeker|jobseeker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobseeker|jobseeker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gathaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthækæth|gæthækæth]] || [[word:gæthækæj|gæthækæj]] || [[word:gæthækæsh|gæthækæsh]] || [[word:gæthækæ|gæthækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathathakath|gathathakath]] || [[word:gathathakaj|gathathakaj]] || [[word:gathathakash|gathathakash]] || [[word:gathathaka|gathathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathakath|gathakath]] || [[word:gathakaj|gathakaj]] || [[word:gathakash|gathakash]] || [[word:gathaka|gathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathafkath|gathafkath]] || [[word:gathafkaj|gathafkaj]] || [[word:gathafkash|gathafkash]] || [[word:gathafkaf|gathafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathakatha|gathakatha]] || [[word:gathakaja|gathakaja]] || [[word:gathakasha|gathakasha]] || [[word:gathakaka|gathakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathakath|gathakath]] || [[word:gathakaj|gathakaj]] || [[word:gathakash|gathakash]] || [[word:gathaka|gathaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathakathal|gathakathal]] || [[word:gathakajal|gathakajal]] || [[word:gathakashal|gathakashal]] || [[word:gathakakal|gathakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathakathatha|gathakathatha]] || [[word:gathakajaja|gathakajaja]] || [[word:gathakashasha|gathakashasha]] || [[word:gathakaka|gathakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathakathan|gathakathan]] || [[word:gathakajan|gathakajan]] || [[word:gathakashan|gathakashan]] || [[word:gathakakan|gathakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathakathaoro|gathakathaoro]] || [[word:gathakajaoro|gathakajaoro]] || [[word:gathakashaoro|gathakashaoro]] || [[word:gathakakaoro|gathakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
